description: §45 / §59.4 clean neg — a map keyed by a struct whose fields are all comparable (`Route:struct = { from: string, to: string }`, `<m>: [Route: int]`) SHALL NOT fire E-EQ-003. Confirms the map-key comparability gate accepts a value-comparable struct key. `notCodes` asserts E-EQ-003 stays silent (mirrors the shipped `maps/struct-key-value-canonical-rt` case).
rationale: §59.4: a struct key with only comparable (non-function) fields is §45-comparable and is a valid map key; E-EQ-003 fires only when the key type contains a function-typed field.
